description: Translate supplied text while preserving terminology, constraints, and uncertainty notes.

verifier.method: term preservation, source coverage, and unsupported-addition checks
verifier.pass_signal: translation preserves required terms, covers the supplied source, names ambiguity, and avoids new claims

mini_tasks.goal: Translate a short Octopus product paragraph into Chinese while preserving Goal, Need, Feed, tentacle, and harness terminology.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: A Chinese translation, term map, ambiguity notes, quality checks, and artifact-backed verifier evidence.

mini_tasks.goal: Translate two short policy sentences into Chinese, preserving Goal, Need, Mem, Feed, tentacle, and harness terms while naming ambiguities.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: A Chinese translation, term map, ambiguity notes, quality checks, and artifact-backed verifier evidence.

mini_tasks.goal: Translate two short policy sentences into Chinese, preserve required domain terms, keep ambiguity notes explicit, and return verifiable check artifacts.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: A Chinese translation, complete term map, ambiguity notes, quality checks, and artifact-backed verifier evidence.

mini_tasks.goal: Translate a policy context sentence with strict term-preservation and explicit ambiguity handling, and require artifact-backed Feed evidence under .octopus/field-mini-task/.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Return translation output, preserved-term map, ambiguity notes, explicit gap metadata when evidence is incomplete, and artifact path under .octopus/field-mini-task/ for verifier evidence.
